title: malleastrum boivinianum
intro: Malleastrum boivinianum, also known as the Boivin's malleastrum, is a plant species native to Madagascar and is a member of the Rutaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Malleastrum boivinianum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Malleastrum boivinianum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine and are also being researched for their potential to develop into modern pharmaceuticals.
